summary.shape_sentence: Gap/drive-style bullish RTH session with violent opening expansion, midday high-base rotation, and a controlled afternoon fade into a still-bullish close.

goat.note: Opening drive from the RTH open into the 10:20 area was the standout directional move.

red_circles.behavior: Bearish pivots were most relevant after the 14:00 high as lower highs developed into the afternoon fade.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots were strongest during the opening drive and on the late-morning defense near 26030-26060.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply around 26135-26160 was tested and marginally exceeded, then respected into the afternoon selloff.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand near 26030-26060 and deeper near 25720-25780 held enough to preserve a bullish session close.

time_markers.10am_blue: Mid-drive bullish continuation around 25980-26020; extended but still accepted higher.
time_markers.12pm_red: Upper-range lunch rotation near 26090-26120 after the morning impulse.
time_markers.2pm_green: HOD zone near 26160; final upside push before afternoon weakness.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed near 26072, below the HOD but firmly above the RTH open.

takeaway: Bullish open-drive trend day with a high-base midday profile and a late controlled reversal attempt; strong morning initiative buying finished green despite afternoon supply rejection.
